query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users WHERE name LIKE '\_T\_%' OR email LIKE '\_T\_%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'leads' as tabela, COUNT(*) FROM leads WHERE nome LIKE '\_T\_%' OR telefone LIKE '\_T\_%'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'projects' as tabela, COUNT(*) FROM projects WHERE nome LIKE '\_T\_%';

UNION ALL

UNION ALL
